Unlock the full potential of your TARA tokens with Lara

How Lara works

Stake your tokens with Lara, and we'll take care of the rest. You'll instantly receive stTARA tokens, which, although tied to your staking rewards, can be used in other DeFi protocols.

Stake

Stake any amount of your tokens to access daily staking rewards

Receive stToken

Receive liquid stTokens and start to receive rewards in real-time

Use in DeFi

Use your stTokens across DeFi to compound more to your daily staked rewards

Join our social channels to contribute to the first DAO on Taraxa.

We`re building the future of Taraxa together.

Lara DAO

The first DAO on Taraxa, The Lara DAO is a Decentralized Autonomous Organization that decides the path of the protocol though the voting power of governance token (LARA) tokens.

How can I participate?
All you need to do is to hold $LARA tokens and vote on proposals via Snapshot.
Where can I get $LARA?
You can get $LARA tokens via the Presale and afterwards, once the protocol launches, on supporting DEXes.
Why is the Lara DAO important?
Without proper staking mechanisms, we can't know whether the right validators receive the abundant stake or not. Via Lara, we ensure that the underlying PoS protocols are secure.
Did the presale for the tokens take place?
Yes, the presale for the tokens did occur. It was conducted successfully, allowing participants to purchase tokens before they were made available to the general public.
When did the token presale start and end?
The token presale started on August 4th, 2024, at 16:00 (CEST) and ended on August 4th, 2024, at 22:17 (CEST). During this period, early investors had the opportunity to acquire tokens at a presale price.
Were all the tokens sold during the presale?
Yes, all the tokens allocated for the presale were successfully sold. You can view the distribution of token holders on the holders explorer page. This page provides detailed information about the token holders and their respective holdings.
